macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Americans Increasingly Pessimistic About Economy Amid High Prices
items.summary: Gallup polls show 47% of Americans rating current economic conditions as 'poor,' up 7 points from March, with 73% saying the economy is worsening. The Gallup Economic Confidence Index dropped to -38, the lowest since November 2023, amid blame on President Trump and elevated gas prices linked to Iran tensions.[1][2]

items.title: Fox News Poll Matches Record High on Economy Worsening Perceptions
items.summary: 70% of registered voters feel the economy is getting worse, up 15 points from last April and matching a 2023 record, with 56% saying Trump's policies are hurting the economy. A Marquette poll indicates 70% expect inflation to rise over the next year.[2]

items.title: S&P's Yergin Warns of Biggest Energy Disruption from Strait of Hormuz Crisis
items.summary: S&P Global Vice Chairman Daniel Yergin describes the Iran-related Strait of Hormuz crisis as the largest energy disruption ever, impacting oil, LNG, and commodities with shortages and rationing in Asia despite resilient financial markets. He highlights a divergence between markets and real-world supply issues.[3]

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: President Trump Speaks at Major Crypto Conference in Florida
items.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump addressed a cryptocurrency conference in Palm Beach on April 25, 2026, discussing digital assets, regulation, and blockchain innovation's future.

items.title: Trump Family's World Liberty Financial Faces Investor Rip-Off Accusations
items.summary: Crypto entrepreneur Justin Sun accuses the Trump family's World Liberty Financial of treating investors like a 'personal ATM' by blocking stake sales, with his holdings dropping over $80 million in value; retail traders report similar issues.

items.title: Bitcoin Faces Potential Fakeout to $85K Before Drop to $50K
items.summary: Analysts warn of a short-term Bitcoin push to $80K-$85K resistance within a bear flag pattern, potentially leading to a flush to $50K support; Ethereum broke $2,400 with upward momentum.

items.title: Bullish Ethereum Forecast Predicts $250K Long-Term Price
items.summary: Etherealiz presents a bull case for Ethereum exceeding $250,000 per token over the long term, amid recent price breakout above $2,400 maintaining upward stairstep momentum.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Qwen 3.6 Max Preview Emerges as Powerful New AI Model
items.summary: Qwen 3.6 Max Preview is hailed as one of the most impressive overlooked AI model releases, outperforming models like Opus 4.5 and Gemini 3, amid a wave of April releases including GPT-5.5. It is fully available on Lovart for testing.
items.source: YouTube - NEW Powerful AI Model EVER!

items.title: Elon Musk Unveils Upgraded Tesla Optimus 'Ultra' Robot
items.summary: Tesla's upgraded Optimus robot, dubbed 'Ultra', advances in intelligence, physical performance, faster learning, precision, and natural movement, leveraging autopilot neural networks. Insiders report accelerated rollout plans.
items.source: YouTube - Elon Musk Just Won the AI Robot Race

items.title: Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.7 Faces User Backlash Over Downgrades
items.summary: User reports highlight significant issues with Claude Opus 4.7, including poor instruction following, lazy responses, and increased hallucinations compared to its predecessor, prompting Anthropic acknowledgment.
items.source: YouTube - Claude Opus 4.7 is Anthropic's downfall

items.title: Google Releases Advanced Deep Research Agent and Gemini Updates
items.summary: Google launches a new Deep Research Agent with major speed and capability improvements in Gemini Deep Research, alongside updates for spatial analysis, 3D pose tracking, and enterprise agent platforms using Cloud TPUs.
items.source: YouTube - Google Just Released The Worlds Most Powerful AI Agent

items.title: Tencent Hy3 Preview and Ling 2.6 Flash Debut as Efficient AI Models
items.summary: Tencent's Hy3 preview, a Mixture-of-Experts model, targets agentic workflows with configurable reasoning modes for balanced speed and performance in code generation. InclusionAI's Ling-2.6-1T offers fast, cost-efficient trillion-parameter execution for real-world agents.
items.source: YouTube - Tencent Hy3 preview & Ling 2.6 flash

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: League of Legends Controller Support Discovered, Fueling Console Port Speculation
items.summary: A recent discovery reveals that League of Legends automatically hooks to controllers when Wide Dynamic Range (WDR) is enabled, sparking theories about an imminent console release. Content creators speculate this could change the game's future, though Riot has not confirmed development.
items.source: YouTube - BIG News For League on Consoles!

items.title: Black Desert Online Global Labs Patch Revives 2-Hour Node Wars and Overhauls Sieges
items.summary: The April 24th Global Labs patch for BDO reintroduces 2-hour Node Wars, adds new territories, adjusts siege mechanics including participation requirements, structures, and rewards. Changes aim to improve Node Wars and Siege gameplay balance.
items.source: YouTube - TWO HOUR NODE WARS ARE BACK!

items.title: Shadowverse Worlds Beyond Unveils Anathema's Gambit Set and Tournament News
items.summary: The latest Shadowverse podcast discusses the new Anathema's Gambit expansion, in-game events, and upcoming tournaments for Worlds Beyond. Highlights include all recent news and strategic insights.

items.title: Xenoblade Chronicles X Definitive Edition on Switch 2 Earns High Praise After 200 Hours
items.summary: A reviewer shares an in-depth analysis of Xenoblade Chronicles X Definitive Edition on Nintendo Switch 2 after 200 hours, calling it one of the best games of all time. The video covers extensive gameplay experiences.

items.title: RAID Shadow Legends 2026 Tier List Ranks All 700+ Champions After Maxing Them
items.summary: A comprehensive tier list for RAID Shadow Legends in 2026 evaluates over 700 maxed champions across all rarities, from meta-defining picks to traps, based on real endgame PvE and PvP testing.
items.source: YouTube - RAID Shadow Legends Tier List

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: X Launches XChat Messaging App for iOS
items.summary: X has introduced XChat, its dedicated messaging application for iOS users, expanding its communication platform offerings.

items.title: SpaceX Selected as US Contractor
items.summary: SpaceX has been selected as one of the contractors for a US government project, marking a significant contract win for the aerospace company.

items.title: RBI Cancels Paytm Payments Bank Licence
items.summary: India's central bank has cancelled the operating licence of Paytm Payments Bank, a major development in India's fintech sector.

items.title: Instagram Launches Instants Standalone App
items.summary: Instagram has quietly launched a new standalone application called Instants, focused on delivering a specialized user experience.

items.title: US, UK, and Australia Sanction Russian Cyber Firms
items.summary: The three countries imposed coordinated sanctions on Russia-based Media Land and related entities for providing infrastructure supporting ransomware and phishing operations.
